visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a checkered flat cap, and a bright yellow t-shirt stands outside a storefront. He gestures with his hands while speaking animatedly to the camera. The background shows store signs with 'miko' and various promotional decals on the glass door. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up product showcase of a silver foldable smartphone. The camera pans across the device's back, highlighting its triple-lens camera module and sleek metallic hinge. The phone is shown in both folded and semi-unfolded states on a dark surface. (3) The man is now inside a well-lit retail store, standing behind a glass display counter containing various smartphone boxes from brands like vivo and OPPO. He points toward the items while maintaining direct eye contact with the lens. (4) The man stands in front of a bright yellow wall featuring a large 'miko' logo. Graphic overlays displaying technical specifications, price comparisons with struck-through text, and colorful icons for gifts (bags, clouds, cards) appear around him. (5) As he continues his presentation, more dynamic text and variety-style graphics like falling coins and celebratory frames appear. The man's facial expressions are highly active, including smiling and wide-eyed surprise. (6) In the final phase, the man strikes a confident pose with a raised fist while looking toward the camera. The background remains the clean, professional interior of the phone retail shop.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Slogan]: miko 米可手機館. (2) [Subtitle]: 欸老闆. [Subtitle]: 這次三星折疊機擠爆牙膏!. (3) [Subtitle]: 害我有點心動想要買. [Subtitle]: 可是我覺得很貴. (4) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講誰說很貴的. [Subtitle]: 我帶你去一個地方. (5) [Subtitle]: 優惠超多超便宜. [Subtitle]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (6) [Slogan]: SAMSUNG Galaxy Z Fold7. [Slogan]: 16G/1T 建議售價 $75900. (7) [Slogan]: 米可價 $67400. [Slogan]: 12G/512G 建議售價 $66900. (8) [Slogan]: 米可價 $55990. [Variety]: 預購享! 容量升級 512GB 256GB. (9) [Slogan]: 價值4000元. [Logo]: Galaxy Store. [Slogan]: 禮物卡 $600. (10) [Logo]: Google AI. [Slogan]: Google AI Pro 6個月 2T雲端空間試用 價值 $3900. (11) [Subtitle]: 再抽 Samsung Wallet 悠遊卡 價值金最高到 1 萬元. (12) [Subtitle]: 跨系統你可以轉移 LINE 資料服務以外. (13) [Subtitle]: 米可獨家1 米可幣最高 $6410 可以現折. (14) [Subtitle]: 米可獨家2 Fold7 再送 25W 的 USB-C 旅充插頭. (15) [Subtitle]: 總共省多少錢. [Variety]: 總共省 $15500!. (16) [Subtitle]: 那 Flip7 有嗎. [Slogan]: 12G/512G 建議售價 $39900. [Slogan]: 米可價 $33900. (17) [Variety]: $10200!. [Subtitle]: 很省吧 趕快來米可.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing glasses, a checkered flat cap, and a bright yellow t-shirt with 'ADDICTED TO GOLF' printed on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts outside a street-side mobile shop at night with metal shutters and signs. Moves inside to a bright, modern retail store with glass counters, white shelving for electronics, and a large yellow 'miko' brand wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice begins speaking Traditional Chinese with a rapid tempo and excited tone. Upbeat electronic BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat plays at approximately 128 BPM. Faint urban street noise is audible in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker's voice maintains high arousal as he discusses product features. Acoustic texture becomes dryer, indicating an indoor environment. (3) A sequence of 'ding' and 'pop' SFX occurs every 2 seconds, highlighting key selling points. The BGM continues with high-energy synth layers. The speaker uses a more projected, authoritative volume. (4) A 'cash register' chime SFX signals the start of the pricing section. The speaker's pitch rises to emphasize savings. The BGM remains consistent without structural breaks. (5) A brief response from a second male voice with lower volume and distance is heard off-mic. The main speaker immediately reacts with a higher-pitched, triumphant exclamation. (6) A digital 'sparkle' SFX plays. The speaker delivers a final call-to-action with a strong command tone. The BGM and vocal tracking end abruptly with a short fade.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Promotion -> Call-to-action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the purchase of the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 and Flip 7 at Miko Mobile Shop by highlighting significantly lower prices than suggested retail and offering exclusive pre-order bonuses.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is centered around pricing at 'miko' mobile shop and explicitly urges viewers to buy there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity retail promotion typical of Taiwanese tech social media, utilizing rapid speech and dense graphic overlays to maintain viewer attention.
